action_text: Click the “All” menu button to open the application navigator
rationale: To reach the "Expense Lines" module, I should first open the left Application Navigator. The “All” button typically reveals apps like “Cost.”
If the app navigator isn’t available, switching the top search context to the Application Navigator can let me search directly for modules like “Expense Lines.”

action_text: Type “Expense Lines” into the global search field
rationale: Directly searching for “Expense Lines” might surface the module or relevant navigation links, expediting access.
Workspaces sometimes provide quick access to domain apps like Cost; exploring here could reveal a shortcut to Expense Lines.

action_text: Wait 1.5 seconds for the page to finish loading
rationale: The page shows a loading spinner; waiting briefly can ensure UI elements are fully interactive before navigating.
